name: BLACK HILLS CORP /SD/
summary: PART I History and Organization Black Hills Corporation, a South Dakota corporation (together with its subsidiaries, referred to herein as the Company, "BHC," we, us, or our), is a customer-focused, growth-oriented utility company headquartered in Rapid City, South Dakota (incorporated in South Dakota in 1941).
